title: stachys pannosa
intro: Stachys pannosa, also known as sticky or woolly hedgentle, is a perennial herb native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Stachys pannosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Stachys pannosa include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
